author: @davemact31
text: We are made in His image yet are far from perfect'. The Church (Pope Francis said) is not a Museum for Saints, but rather a Hospital for Sinners. God gave us all a chance, so when I screw up I hope you'll be kind. Tough topic. You have been a Gentleman!

author: @valvelifter1951

author: @danielingraham9701
text: Hello Robert. I just would like to say that I have watched a few of your videos and totally love what you have placed out here for the rest of us. I wish you were my neighbor as I am very creative in thinking and taking on challenges. I look forward to finding the links you placed in some of the subjects boxes of which I was ignorant and unaware you have done so. However, I just desire to say Thank You for this opportunity to learn new things taught by you to wet my feet in areas I have not before explored. Thanks again. Daniel

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate and it is a shame we are not nearer - the things we could come up with!

author: @barrymiller1625
text:
Off the topic: Have you watched any of your videos with the Closed Captions on? It is hilarious! 
Can't thank you enough for your efforts!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I once saw the transcripts - wow what rubbish - but I must try the ccs lol

author: @kenatnip568
text:
Hello Robert,

This is only the second of your videos that I've seen so far and have been impressed with both. I love your attitude and fully agree with the way you moderate, thank you for maintaining a place for those who wish to learn.

I have to say up front that I will likely have many questions and some of them may seem dumb. I apologize ahead of time but hope to learn much from you and those who comment. Are you a scientist or a teacher? Either way I'm glad I found your channel.

Blessings to you and your house.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I was a teacher mate and now i work in graphene for a number of companies as a consultant

replies.author: @kenatnip568
replies.text: Thanks for sharing, much appreciated

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text:
Ken Atnip
my pleasure mate - glad you liked it

author: @billyc4111
text:
Just found this vid robert ! My dad said you will never get in the raf when i applieď  ! My teachers wrote me off as thick at school ! 
I thought i was, but thèn i got in the air forcè ,that was the start of my self belief ! F*** em,,  if you have self belief you start to acheive what you thought was beyond you!  I served 9 ýears iin the raf as a communications eng , when i left i worked in saudi teaching combat net radio repair and use. I up until seeing your vids had never tried chemistry. Now i cant get enough mistakes and all ! SO A heartfelt thankyou robert wish i had come across you 40 years ago.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: bless your heart mate - that is a cool story and i think you are 100% right - it's all about believing in yourself and trying

author: @americaswakeupcall1832
text:
This was actually a pretty good video. I've gotten so fed up with the comments on some of these channels I just unsubscribe and don't go back. Who would have thought there were so many geniuses out there willing point out that, 'It would have been better if you would have done this or used that' and then allow us to witness an example of their superior intelligence. But the 'Battles of the Step Children' as I call them are worse! "Oh yes it is!", "Oh no it's not!",  "Oh yes it is!", "Oh no it's not!", "Oh yes it is!", "Oh no it's not!", "Punk!", "Jerk!", "Ass!", "Butt Head!", "I know you are but what am I?" It almost makes me wish they lived next door so I could go over and slap the hell out of them!
  You might consider modifying this video so it can be universally applied to a wide range of channels on youtube. I don't think people that host these youtube channels even realize that 'comment management' or the lack thereof, may play a big part in the success of their channels and loss of subscribers.
  Just sayin! I commend you on your ability to say what you meant so politely!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: thank you very much for your comments mate - i will think about the modification you suggest

author: @bridgendesar
text: If I was building an ark, you'd get the first seat.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: bless your heart mate

author: @THR33SHOES46and2
text: Some folk ya just cant reach. :) I can predict alot of headscratching on my behalf tryin to keep up. I think its great that you share your insight so freely. It is however shameful that you have to tell people how they should act. (*-°)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: It is a great shame - I had a post from somebody complaining about my hair and teeth - It was just rude - I have no idea what the guy was thinking - I banned him

author: @KK4UTO
text: Brilliant. These should be the standard rules for all channels. Rude, Holier that thou, trolls get old fast. Thanks you for saying what needs to be said.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate - i hope it makes a difference - i think it does - i think most of the comments on the channel are pretty good

author: @AndyShell
text: Very well approached and said. It is unfortunate that this needs to be addressed but people seem to think they can write anything on the internet.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I think only a few think that way but they spoil it for others

author: @08maxhr
text:
Nicely done! Its sad people dont understand your point. You're one of the few youtubers that really care about the comment environment, and i think thats something very unique of your chanel. It helps people learn and contribute at the same time, and the most important thing is always respect someones level of knowledge because in the end we all were beginners at some point.
Trust your beliefs and keep up your awesome work... Big fan btw!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - cheers mate - there is a lot of good info in the comments and a lot of people share some very good ideas - I don't think that should be spoiled by idiots - thanks for the support

author: @martynkemp5286

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate

author: @mateuszgwozdz
text: Everyone has the same problem in the Internet, it's full of sh*t mixed with nice bits. If you will be emotional about inevitable haters you will bring more of their attention and cause an additional damage. I'd suggest removing this and "SWAG" videos, for the good of this channel's viewers sake

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering

author: @misteragreeable8360
text:
As you said this shouldn't have had to be made. It's been my experience that the problem people are always the same people. I don't think that there are that many, percentage wise, in any population. Those that are there though, really make life in general difficult in every way possible.
A little regulation, as you said censorship, prevents a tragedy of the commons situation from developing. Just chiming my 3 cents in. You and the other commentors hit it pretty well. A thank you to everyone else hear for supporting you in a positive way.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: they can be very vocal and I agree with your thanks to the tremendous support from everybody - it is well appreciated

author: @AlternativeDIYEnergy
text: Hello Robert. I agree complete;y with all that you have said. I hope that this comment will be read by others. I am no way a scientist or anything else with a title. So I knew nothing at first. You have nurtured my imagination and helped me to grasp the concepts of your videos. To learn is the very thing that I need to keep my brain alive and not to stagnate in front of a box playing games. Human nature in majority of spectrums and cultures is to explore. To find out what is out there. That is what keeps us alive. It is what people like yourself helps others achieve. Mental life. I have learned such alot in the short time I have known you Robert. I thank you from the bottom of my heart. I have already got some ideas with your latest project that I wish to impliment at my earliest opportunity. So to the reader. If you are not really interested. Don't bother. If you have anything to say about this comment. Please direct them to me. Not Robert. All the best Robert.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Bless your heart mate and thanks for that

replies.author: @AlternativeDIYEnergy
replies.text:
Robert Murray-Smith
You deserve it. Take care my friend.

replies.author: @AlternativeDIYEnergy
replies.text: Thanks to everyone who gave my comment a +!.
